prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated 1.8L 16V **EA827 (KR code)** from the VW Golf GTI 16V, featuring a **Schrick 276° camshaft**, **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 compression)**, and a **JE high-strength connecting rod set**. Pair with a **Bosch Motronic M2.7 ECU** reflashed via **ChipTuning.de Stage 2+ software** for 160+ HP on 98 RON fuel.

Forced induction via a **Garrett GT2560R turbocharger** with a **custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold** (fabricated by **Steinbauer Engineering**), a **GReddy Type-S intercooler (front-mount)**, and a **034 Motorsport billet aluminum intake manifold** with a **45mm Jenvey throttle body**. Boost controlled via a **TurboSmart Kompact 40mm wastegate** and logged via an **AEM X-Series wideband AFR gauge**.

Suspension overhaul with **Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers (VW Derby-specific valving)**, **H&R 24mm front and 22mm rear anti-roll bars**, and **Powerflex polybushings (full set, including subframe mounts)**. Braking upgraded to **Brembo GT 4-piston calipers (from VW Corrado G60)** with **326mm vented rotors** and **Ferodo DS2500 pads**, paired with **Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel brake lines**.
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Pandem Designs, Derby-specific)** with **custom carbon fiber fender flares** and **extended steel rear quarters**, retaining the original 3-door hatchback silhouette. Painted in **Lamborghini Verde Ithaca (PPG code: 488/3L) with a 3-stage pearl finish**.

OEM+ interior with **Recaro SRD-E (VW Motorsport) seats** in **black Alcantara with green stitching**, a **Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede)**, and a **custom roll cage (T45 steel, bolt-in, by Custom Cages UK)** painted in **gloss black**. Shift knob replaced with a **short-throw aluminum unit from 02M Motorsport**.

Aerodynamics package featuring a **custom carbon fiber front splitter (by Maxton Design, 3D-scanned for Derby chassis)** with **integrated canards**, a **Volkswagen Motorsport rear diffuser (from the Polo R WRC replica kit)**, and a **custom aluminum rear wing (single-element, 1200mm width, adjustable angle)** mounted on **APR GT-300 wing risers**. Wheels: **BBS RS-GT (15x8 ET15 front, 15x9 ET0 rear)** with **Nankang AR-1 semi-slick tires (195/50/15 front, 225/45/15 rear)**.
